dialogue: This morning, you did something terribly bad... again...?
You were playing with the ball, and broke three windows.
You were sent to detention at the library, where the teacher is waiting for you...
Oh dear, you're the little rascal who broke three windows, aren't you?
Let's use this detention time to practice reading.
It was correct.
Let's continue with some more exercises!
Time for more questions after this warmup.
That's right!
Your answers were very good.
Time for the next exercise.
Good answers!.
I'll let you leave detention sooner if you keep working hard.
Let's go to the next page in your book.
I'm sure you can answer these questions correctly!
Very good!
You have been doing very well so far.
Your detention is almost over
If you answer these exercises correctly first!
Wonderful! That was impressive
This detention went quite fast.
You've been doing really well with these exercises!
There are only a few questions yet.
It will be a bit harder though...
Amazing! You have completed all the exercises.
I am very proud of you.
Your detention is over now, keep being a good student and congratulations!
